ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic dataset */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "pce" REAL /* Personal consumption expenditures */,
  "pop" INTEGER /* Population */,
  "psavert" REAL /* Personal savings rate */,
  "uempmed" REAL /* Unemployment median */,
  "unemploy" INTEGER /* Number of unemployed individuals */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection method */,
  "geographic_region" TEXT /* Geographic region where data was collected */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the data source was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "interval_days" INTEGER /* Number of days between collections */,
  "last_collection_date" TEXT /* Last date the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "tool_used" TEXT /* Tool or software used for data collection */,
  "last_collection_date" TEXT /* Last date the data was collected */,
  "collection_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the data was versioned */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 1.1) */,
  "released_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who released the version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_released_by FOREIGN KEY ("released_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_name" TEXT /* Name of the metadata (e.g., data source, data collection method) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., source, method) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metadata */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the metadata was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., personal consumption expenditures, population growth) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_tags_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "data_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first data in the relationship */,
  "data_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second data in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., related to, similar to) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_relationships_data_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("data_id_1") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_relationships_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_relationships_data_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("data_id_2") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being granted permission */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
